svg.title: Agent files, structure, and LLM connectivity
svg.desc: Left shows agent file format (YAML/JSON/Python), middle shows architecture components, right shows runtime with API endpoint and authentication.

g.text: How agent knows where LLM is
1. API endpoint URL is stored in config (e.g. https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages)
2. API key (sk-ant-...) is passed in request Authorization header
3. Model name tells LLM server which model weights to use
4. At runtime, agent makes HTTPS POST request to endpoint with auth
5. LLM server verifies key, processes request, returns response to agent
6. Agent parses response and continues event loop
